'''Nevik''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. While hunting [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] spies, he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Sollaine]] by disagreeing over their position.

{{Char-stub}}
